{{Quote|There's nothing delightful or hopeful about the wasteland of a Gromas moon, day or night, with its interminable red dome.|Kyle Katarn|<ref name="Dark Forces Official Player's Guide">''[[Dark Forces Official Player's Guide]]''</ref>}}
'''Gromas 16''', nicknamed the '''Blood Moon''', was the sixteenth moon of the gas-giant [[Gromas/Legends|Gromas]] in the [[Gromas system/Legends|Gromas system]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim's]] [[Perkell sector/Legends|Perkell sector]]. 

==Description==
The moon is one of the multicolored orbits around the primary [[star/Legends|star]] Gromas. This particular moon, thanks to its rust red soil, plus the light of the primary, it was nicknamed the "Blood Moon".<ref name="wizards" />

6,220 kilometers in diameter, the small arid, desert moon had weaker than standard gravity, a day length of 14 standard hours, and a year of 195 standard days.<ref name="wizards" />

==History==
Gromas 16 was an unremarkable moon until heavy deposits of [[phrikite]] were discovered, causing prospectors to seek claims on the sector capital of [[Trancret]]. The exploration companies had a brief period of prosperity until an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] task force sealed off the Gromas system and ejected the prospectors.<ref name="wizards" />

After clearing the Gromas system, the Empire established the mine on Gromas 16 (as well as satellite facilities on other moons<ref name="wizards" />) to acquire large amounts of [[phrikite]] for use in their [[Dark Trooper Project]].<ref name="df" /> On that facility test refining was done, as did on [[Fest/Legends|Fest]] and (mostly) on [[Anteevy/Legends|Anteevy]].<ref name="wizards" /> Rebel agent [[Kyle Katarn]], having discovered a sample on Fest, was led to [[Mission to Gromas|infiltrate the facility]], detonating the reactor to destroy it.<ref name="df">''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]''</ref> 

After Katarn's assault, the termination of the Project, and the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|death]] of Emperor [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]], the Empire abandoned the system, leaving the skeleton of the base behind, and empty facilities on the other moons. Shortly thereafter, prospectors returned to Gromas, and found the destroyed base on Gromas 16.<ref name="wizards" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Star Wars: Dark Forces Remaster]]''
